'''Drama Korr's space yacht''' was a sizable silver-and-gray luxury [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] owned by [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Drama Korr]]. Korr was [[Death/Legends|killed]] aboard the [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] in the [[Karthakk system]] by [[Durge/Legends|Durge]], who later engaged [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in combat aboard the ship.

==Appearances==
*[[Obsession 2|''Obsession'' 2]]
